description: read a DICOM file and extract its metadata (patient/study/series/image elements) as formatted text or JSON
rules: output (metadata.txt or metadata.json) written to record_store
degrades gracefully when pydicom is not importable
usage: Set DICOM_IN (input .dcm file). Optional META_FORMAT (text|json, default text). Output: metadata.txt or metadata.json under record_store.
limitation: Read-only: parses metadata only. Sequences (VR 'SQ') are summarised, not expanded. Requires pydicom; degrades to a placeholder if pydicom is absent.
